allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
fix\(dat\): implement hybrid RAG extraction to resolve AI Act detection failure and eliminate hallucinations

Problem diagnosed:
- AI Act section \(2 pages with XGBoost, Vertex AI, SHAP values\) was lost due to brutal 28k char truncation
- DORA analysis mixed chunks from different DAT documents
- Hardcoded 100% confidence despite hallucinations
- num_ctx=8192 tokens caused context overflow

Solution implemented:
- New method `analyze_dat_with_rag_extraction\(\)` with intelligent chunking
- 5 targeted RAG queries per regulation \(AI Act, DORA, RGPD, NIS2, CRA\)
- Top 3 chunks per query, max 15 total, deduped and sorted by relevance
- Real confidence score calculated from average chunk relevance
- Temporary ChromaDB indexing with strict source filtering
- No more truncation - full document processed with smart extraction
- Context optimized to ~15k chars of most relevant sections

Expected improvements:
- AI Act will now detect XGBoost, Vertex AI, SHAP from section 2
- DORA won''t mix documents \(where={source: temp_source} filter\)
- Confidence will reflect actual chunk relevance \(not hardcoded 1.0\)
- No more "aucun élément d 'IA/ML" false negatives

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(du document technique."
  * Non applicable → Pure internal infrastructure

Key principle: Express uncertainty clearly rather than masking it
with tags or binary conclusions. "Indéterminé" is professionally
defensible; "priority low, no gaps" on unresolved legal questions is not.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
